p0_findings.title: iOS sandbox story-detail rendering breaks full-screen template overlays

p1_findings.title: Android instrumented capture parity run not exercised by this gate

pipeline_report.reason: Step 2 (xcodebuild captures) reproducibly fails at waitForExistence(idle-context-capsule). Running pipeline would either error out or emit automation-fallback issues, which would misrepresent fidelity state. Skipped per Decision D-003 in gate-evidence/decisions.md.

AC-1.description: design-review skill report exists with no unresolved P0/P1 findings
AC-1.evidence: gate-evidence/design-review-skill-report.md exists; has 1 unresolved P0 + 1 unresolved P1, both explicitly deferred in gate-evidence/decisions.md

AC-2.evidence: Pipeline did not run end-to-end. xcodebuild capture probe (distilled to gate-evidence/ios-simulator/probe-tests.json + probe-summary.json) failed at idle-context-capsule waitForExistence (1 failed / 0 passed).

AC-3.description: gate-evidence/ contains design-review-skill-report.md, report.json, report.html, comparison.png, ios-* xcresult, manual-run.md
AC-3.evidence: design-review-skill-report.md present; decisions.md present; probe xcresult archived. report.json, report.html, comparison.png NOT generated this cycle (would be fabricated).

AC-4.description: SPRINT.md cites evidence and Status flipped to Done
AC-4.evidence: Per Decision D-004, SPRINT.md is NOT updated this cycle because AC-1..AC-3 are unmet.

AC-5.evidence: Per Decision D-005, IDLE-S06-T11 is NOT closed this cycle because AC-1..AC-4 are unmet.

escalations.scope: Honor Story.previewMode == .fullScreen in LaneShadowSandboxStoryDetail (option a) OR re-point DesignReviewCaptureTests at -DirectIdleScreenUITest with mocked-variant support (option c). Either fixes the sandbox rendering blocker that prevents the strict design-review pipeline from running.

escalations.subject: CAPS-S07-T07 cycle 3 commit (6df337bcc)
escalations.claim: 'Verified with real waitForExistence assertions on idle-context-capsule + idle-map-controls'
escalations.actual: Probe xcresult shows waitForExistence still fails. The cycle 3 commit message likely conflated build success with runtime success. Recommend a remediation cycle on T07 OR fold into the new CAPS-S07-T17 task fix (since the test code itself is correct — the host is the blocker).

escalations.subject: Android instrumented capture path
escalations.scope: Run kotlin DesignReviewCaptureTests on a connected emulator and (separately) wire Android sources into pnpm design:review's export step so the pipeline supports cross-platform fidelity verification.
